title: hieracium bupleuroides subsp. mnoolepium
intro: Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. mnoolepium is a lesser-known subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. Its health benefits include soothing digestive issues and reducing fever, as well as having antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. The herbal preparations of Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. mnoolepium typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to affected areas.
